name: shalem-care
description: Shalem Care — open social-care platform · monorepo entry for hosters that expect a root package.json (Hostinger, Render, Railway). Real app lives in apps/web.

scripts.// note: Hostinger setzt NODE_ENV=production, deshalb erzwingen wir --include=dev — ohne tailwindcss/postcss/typescript scheitert next build. NODE_OPTIONS hebt den V8-Heap auf 2 GB an, weil 166 MB public-assets + tracing den Default-512-MB-Heap auf Hostinger sonst sprengen.
scripts.build: cd apps/web && npm install --include=dev && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 npm run build && node ../../scripts/post-build.mjs
